programme.title: E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E9 - Sleepy Stars
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E18 - JJ's Animal Friends & Counting!
programme.desc: Join JJ for fun with animal friends & counting! JJ has to find five little ducks that ran away from their bath! Then, Bear helps JJ search nature to find his missing teddy bear. The animal fun continues as JJ plays hide-and-seek with shark toys, counts baby ducklings at the park & watches ten little dinosaur eggs hatch! Plus, act out the story of the 'Three Little Pigs' & sing along to 'Little Miss Muffet'!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E3 - Roof Of The World
programme.desc: Back in 1955 Tim had arrived in Nepal by crossing the Middle East, but today Iran is hostile, Iraq fragile, and Syria still at war. Alex and Nat are forced on a detour through western China and Central Asia, a journey filled with dangers of its own.

programme.desc: Robson makes his way to South America to meet the marine life of Brazil.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. He visits St.Lucia, a town where hippos roam the streets freely at night, feeding on the manicured lawns and bushes of the townsfolk. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.title: Le JT de la Coupe du monde
programme.desc: Un retour sur les meilleurs moments de la Coupe du monde de football, avec les plus beaux buts et les plus belles actions.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Le club Paris direct[Live]
programme.desc: Des experts issus de la géopolitique, des sciences de l'environnement, des sciences sociales et de la culture se réunissent pour analyser et débattre des sujets majeurs qui dominent l'actualité. Leurs échanges offrent des clés de compréhension sur les enjeux contemporains et leurs impacts.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: C'est en France
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur l'actualité en France : société, politique et culture. À travers des reportages et des interviews, nous explorons les enjeux du quotidien pour mieux comprendre la réalité vécue par les Français aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Billet retour
programme.desc: Les reporters de France 24 reviennent dans des villes oubliées qui ont fait la Une de l'actualité. Comment vit-on dans les villes traumatisées par une guerre, une catastrophe naturelle ou un désastre industriel ?

programme.title: Questions directes[Live]
programme.desc: Un invité répond aux questions directes de la rédaction, pour tout comprendre d'un fait de l'actualité du jour.

programme.desc: Un retour sur les meilleurs moments de la Coupe du monde de football, avec les plus beaux buts et les plus belles actions.

programme.title: Paris direct : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un flux d'actualités en continu pour suivre en temps réel les breaking news, les sujets tendances et les analyses sur la culture, la santé, la technologie et l'environnement. Reste informé de tout ce qui compte, au moment où cela se passe en continu 24/7.

programme.title: Plan B
programme.desc: À la découverte d'initiatives concrètes et innovantes dans les domaines de l'écologie, de l'économie circulaire, de la transition énergétique et de la consommation responsable, afin de mieux comprendre les solutions qui façonnent le monde de demain

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: C'est en France
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur l'actualité en France : société, politique et culture. À travers des reportages et des interviews, nous explorons les enjeux du quotidien pour mieux comprendre la réalité vécue par les Français aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Lamhe
programme.desc: Viren falls for Pallavi, but she marries Siddharth. The couple dies, leaving behind their daughter, who grows up to look just like her mother and falls in love with Viren. Release Year: 1991 Director: Yash Chopra Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Film - Yash Chopra, Best Story - Honey Irani, Best Dialogue - Rahi Masoom Raza, Best Costume Design - Neeta Lulla

programme.title: Lajja
programme.desc: Four women from different walks of life, all victims of male chauvinism, are brought together due to common circumstances. Release Year: 2001 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi

programme.title: Ribbon
programme.desc: A young working urban couple is overwhelmed with the birth of a baby girl and find that parenthood comes with its own challenges.

programme.title: E138
programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: Dr. Noyonika's quiet life with her daughter, Ujjayani, takes a chaotic turn when she meets young pop star Ishaan. Now, she must choose between societal judgment and a rare second chance.

programme.title: E64
programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

E151 - Daddy's Movie Camera
programme.desc: Daddy gets a new video camera. First, Peppa shows him how to work it, and then he records Peppa being silly.

programme.title: E108 - Elf Joke Day / King Thistle's New Clothes
programme.desc: The Wise Old Elf plays a trick on Nanny Plum, but she gets her revenge by turning the Wise Old Elf into a snail. // Snooty King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit. When the King's new clothes get dirty, Nanny accidentally shrinks them all.

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E151 - Daddy's Movie Camera
programme.desc: Daddy gets a new video camera. First, Peppa shows him how to work it, and then he records Peppa being silly.

programme.title: E605 - Race To Sky High Mountain
programme.desc: At the starting line for Race to Sky High Mountain, one of Crusher's cheats threatens to sideline Blaze for good. To get back in this race, Blaze will need... Power Tires!

programme.title: E119 - The Crew Builds A Giant Lemonade Stand / The Crew Builds A Wildlife Bridge
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: E809 - Pups Save The Treasure Cruise / Pups Save Rocket Ryder
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger tricks people to sail icy waters in search of an Antarctic treasure but they all need rescued when they get stranded on shore. // The pups need to rescue Ryder and Alex when they get out of control on a rocket-powered ATV.

programme.title: E108 - Elf Joke Day / King Thistle's New Clothes
programme.desc: The Wise Old Elf plays a trick on Nanny Plum, but she gets her revenge by turning the Wise Old Elf into a snail. // Snooty King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit. When the King's new clothes get dirty, Nanny accidentally shrinks them all.

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: E104 - Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: E203 - Isa's Royal Garden Party
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit.

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E104 - The Hunt For The Hidden Hive
programme.desc: Special agent Indie helps the pals reunite a lost bee with the rest of her hive.

programme.title: E206 - The Traffic Jam
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig have invited Peppa and her family to lunch. On the way, Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig get caught in a very long traffic jam, so Grandpa Pig decides to bring the lunch to them.

programme.title: E915 - Pups Save A Playful Elephant Calf
programme.desc: When Everest joins the Paw Patrol for a visit to the jungle, she makes friends with a clumsy elephant calf and then must help rescue him.

programme.desc: When the neighbouring empire attacks a Mongol caravan and humiliates Chinggis Khan's envoys, he unleashes a devastating campaign.

programme.title: E2 - A Gamble On The Weather
programme.desc: A father in Manila Bay strains to protect his family from the ever-rising tide.

programme.title: E10 - Siargao 60Min
programme.desc: Beach lovers can explore breathtaking island destinations with model and socialite Maggie Wilson and travel host Marc Nelson in 'BEACHED'.

US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Access Middle East
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world's most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world's most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Why Oil Won't Get Cheaper. The US-Iran Deal And The Price Of Everything
programme.desc: The dust is settling after a new US-Iran deal - but one question still matters: when will oil prices feel normal again? Since the war began in late February, markets have been on a rollercoaster. And even with an agreement in place, the damage isn't just political-it's physical.

programme.title: The Current Affairs Documentary
programme.desc: It's World Cup season in Mexico - yet the spectacle can't hide a dark reality in the country. Over 100,000 people are still listed missing. It's believed many of them have been murdered.

programme.desc: The dust is settling after a new US-Iran deal - but one question still matters: when will oil prices feel normal again? Since the war began in late February, markets have been on a rollercoaster. And even with an agreement in place, the damage isn't just political-it's physical.

programme.title: E395 - Speedway Thrills
programme.desc: In Arizona, Mike relives the thrill of speedway history thanks to a motorbike-loving family of adrenaline junkies and their garage full of one-of-a-kind racing mementos.

programme.title: E9 - Most Valuable Toys
programme.desc: From Lionel Trains to video games, for the right collector, our childhood toys can be worth millions! Over the last decades, people have paid some truly outrageous prices for the toys they always wanted.

programme.title: E10 - The Prank Toy Race
programme.desc: For six decades two silly but savvy entrepreneurs-S.S. Adams and H. Fishlove-turned their love of a good joke into a booming prank toy industry. Their rivalry produced hundreds of tricks and gags.

programme.title: E2 - Ice Cream Revolution
programme.desc: A cab driver turned ice cream entrepreneur comes up with the idea to mix name-brand candy into high-quality ice cream to create novel new flavours.

programme.title: E3 - Butterfly Knife In Your Stomach?
programme.desc: The Batangas region of the Philippines is famous for its butterfly-knife makers and wielders. Jaime learns a few tricks as she passes through but when she comes under unexpected attack, will they work?

programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip. // Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds 'Patty Whips' to the menu at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E249 - Sandy's Nutty Nieces
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's 3 nieces.

programme.title: E118 - Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: E106 - Night Of The Mechazoids
programme.desc: The Turtles take the fight to Bishop but she's ready for them... get ready for MECHA-BIHSOP! But when the Mechazoids go out of control, can the Turtles save humanity?

programme.title: E244 - The Krusty Slammer / Pineapple RV
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse after Plankton breaks the law, but crime only pays for so long. // SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: E106 - Tenta-Flakes / Boss Level
programme.desc: Best and Bester go on a mission to find out what gives their favourite cereal 'Tenta-Flakes' such a purply taste. // Bester's outlandish ideas to make mini golf fun for the customers nearly lead to disaster, but Best saves the day.

programme.title: E107 - Stage Struck / Ball Count
programme.desc: Best's sound effects threaten to derail Bester's one chance to shine on the opening night of a Flip Flop's play. // Best and Bester's 'inbestigation' into some missing golf balls escalates into a full-blown mountain rescue mission.

programme.desc: Plankton's family open their own restaurant...directly next to the Chum Bucket. // SpongeBob suddenly finds everything funny...much to everyone's annoyance.

programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward. Squidward does not.

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E9 - Whitetail Deer & Cranberries

programme.title: E10 - Landlocked Salmon & Chaga

programme.title: E9 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1 - Coral Sea Dreaming
programme.desc:
Coral Sea Dreaming enters into the very heart of life - and death - on a coral reef. The film follows a story that spans 500 million years and stars some of the most exotic and wondrous marine creatures on earth. Coral is the planets greatest natural architect, and coral reefs boast the highest biodiversity of any ecosystem.
We meet thousands of reef inhabitants, from ancient turtles to feeding sharks, adorable pygmy seahorses and savage sea slugs, witness a manta ray ballet and courting octopus. Specialized state-of-the-art High Definition technology captures these lives with unprecedented intimacy, illustrating elaborate courtship displays, mating rituals, feeding frenzies, intense nighttime predation, cannibalism and chemical warfare.
Filmed over 2000 dives on coral reef ecosystems; The Great Barrier Reef, Ningaloo Reef, Papua New Guinea and at the Coral Sea; Coral Sea Dreaming is a celebration of reefs now under threat of ocean acidification and climate change. There is much t

programme.title: E3 - Warwick Davis
programme.desc: Legendary actor Warwick Davis is on a Mission with Bear Grylls in the mountains of the Lake District.

programme.title: E27 - The Lost Forest
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: E36 - Burning Up
programme.desc: Wendy and Thelma are spending the summer holidays at their grandfather's house in the heart of nature. As city dwellers, they're worried about getting bored. But this summer, the two sisters discover that their grandfather's estate is more than just a park: it is home to chimeras, amazing creatures with magical powers.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

Sigabo[Live]
programme.desc: The series explores the stark contrast in the lives of two individuals: Gabo (Martin), a spunky, street-smart man from a vibrant, humble community, and Samantha (Montes), a tough, fearless law enforcer from a highly affluent and privileged background. It blends action, romance, and comedy as their paths cross and their different worlds collide.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Best of RG 2026 -Day 4 Men's Singles Rd 2 Zverev v Machac
E17 - 兩米高男嘉賓邂逅心儀女生
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E12 - 西班牙之旅開啟
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E61
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.desc: Today's homes will focus on 'Home Interiors for Families,' reflecting the rising popularity of family-orientated designs. We'll be sharing many tips that bring small but certain happiness to your home.

programme.title: E4 - Lamb Meatballs With Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.desc: At the first stop, Ulaan Chuluut landfill, 'Trash Uncle' Kim Seok-hoon is back in action, diving into cleanup mode. But he finds something shocking that leaves him furious. What happened at the landfill?

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.desc: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard the rockhopper penguin, and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon in her golden years. Later, say an emotional goodbye as Rocco the wombat returns to the wild.

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E6 - Amazon Monkeys
programme.desc: Get an inside look at the Pantanal’s most extraordinary primate families. Check out the ear-splitting cries of howler monkeys, the fearless leaps of curious saki monkeys, and the agile tails of highly intelligent white-whiskered spider monkeys.

All's Well End's Well (Extended ver)
programme.desc: All's Well, Ends Well is a comic romance of 3 hapless brothers, who eventually learn through their amorous exploits and misadventures that love is only won through gradual nurturing, and quickly lost through the quick, dishonest, selfish ways which they have always taken for granted.

programme.title: When East Goes West
programme.desc: Fei is the master cook in Hong Kong, while his son Suckling has established himself as a real estate salesman in Canada. Suckling sends for his father to join him in this new chapter of their lives. Happily, Fei hops on a plane to Canada. During the flight, he has the good fortune of meeting Yim Chau, a young woman traveling to join her aunt in Canada. Subsequently, Fei meets Yim Chau's aunt and Suckling meets Yim Chau. Suckling loves Yim Chau but is too shy to express his feelings. When Yim Chau announces she falls in love with Richard, Suckling feels heartbroken but still helps her with dating preparations. However, when he discovers Richard cheating her, Suckling fights him. At the same time, he is being chased by the bank for debts...

programme.title: Doctor Vampire
programme.desc: Dr. Chiang, a Hong Kong surgeon, finds himself surrounded by beautiful girls in an old castle. Little does he realize these are the Count's vampire girls. He has a one-night stand with Alice who bites him while he was unaware. He gradually assumes the characteristics of a vampire. Alice breaks with the Count and goes to Hong Kong to save Dr. Chiang. That gets him into hot water with his girlfriend May...

programme.title: Princess D
programme.desc: When Joker meets Ling in a disco one night, he feels she is the perfect model of his dream project 'princess-d'. In reality, however, Ling is the opposite of the perfect image...

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: Chick, Chi-to and Lucky are blood brothers. Chi-to's cousin, Chan, acts as a go-between and arranges a trafficking of counterfeit U.S. notes between Chi-to's group and the local triad society in Taiwan. However, Chan is a double-cross by informing the police of the trafficking. At the ambush, police injure Lucky and arrest him, while the rest have a narrow escape and land on a boat back to Hong Kong. On their return, Chan deliberately kills Lucky's wife Ngao and shots Chick into the sea. Lucky is free from jail and returns to Hong Kong five years later. Touchingly reunited with Chi-to, Lucky is told that Chick was dead and Ngao was disappeared during their run away. Meantime, Chan assigns his mistress Elsa to keep an eye on Lucky...

programme.title: Plain Jane To The Rescue
programme.desc: Jenny, with the plain looks but a heart of gold, she is always in between jobs. Once she gets a job, her knack of creating awkward situations immediately loses it for her. Fang is her suitor, but he gets nowhere as the girl has no time for love, so Fang goes along with her in job hunting. A big group called Sanda wants to take over the whole city through take-over deals. They are ruthless and have thrown thousands into the streets. Jenny and Fang, bungling as they are, become the vanguard of a movement against the great conglomerate. They were even being hunted by the group and their life was threatened...

programme.title: Fly Me to The Saitama – FROM BIWA LAKE WITH LOVE
programme.desc: A live-action film adaptation of Mineo Maya's “Fly Me to the Saitama” turned out to be a huge, unexpected box office hit of 2019. With the producers who took the demand for a sequel as real, the cast and crew got back together to complete the second chapter of the urban legend in Fly Me To The Saitama -FROM BIWA LAKE WITH LOVE-. In addition to the biting yet affectionate dissing of Saitama and the Kanto region in the first film, the sequel contains an even more scathing dissing of the Kansai region. Alongside costars GACKT and Fumi Nikaido, Ryo Kato and Tsubasa Masuwaka reprise their roles as members of the Saitama Liberation Front. A crucial protagonist who joins their battle, Kai Kikyo, the handsome leader of the Shiga Liberation Front, is played by Anne in her first role as male character. Akira Kashoji, the ruthless governor of Osaka and kingpin of the Kansai region who stands in the way of Rei and others, is played by Ainosuke Kataoka. In addition to Norika Fujiwara and

programme.title: Hand Rolled Cigarette
programme.desc: Former Hong Kong Military Service Corps officer becomes caught in a triad manhunt when he takes in an ethnic South Asian man carrying a bag of stolen drugs. Forced to live under the same roof, the two men transcend their cultural and racial differences to form a beautiful friendship in this poignant tale of loyalty and brotherhood.

programme.title: The Beast Stalker
programme.desc: A traffic accident changed their lives forever. In capturing wanted criminal Zhang Yidong, Sergeant Tang Fei was involved in a gunfight and car accident that put the criminal in a coma. But in the process he also crippled an fellow officer, and mistakenly shot dead the elder daughter of public prosecutor and single mother Gao Min. Unable to handle the guilt, Tang Fei succumbs to a fog of pain. Gao Min, meanwhile, pours all her love and attention to her younger daughter Ling. Three months later, the criminal Zhang Yidong awakens from his coma. Gao Min, who had been working hard on bringing him to justice, insists he stand trial immediately.

programme.title: Ichikei’s Crow The Movie
programme.desc: Two years have passed since Michio Irima left first criminal court (commonly known as “Ichikei”). Michio is transferred to Setouchi in Okayama Prefecture, where he is assigned to an assault case involving the youngest Minister of Defense in history. His investigations lead him to look into a collision incident involving an Aegis warship, but the details of the ships voyage are a national secret. Michio is now faced with an adversary upon which the threat of “official authority” does not work. Meanwhile, Chizuru Sakama, who has tried numerous cases with Michio, is working as a lawyer in a neighboring town under a work experience program. There, she takes on a case involving a large local company which supports the whole town, but not all is as it seems...Between these seemingly disparate cases, a shocking truth arises. Are they opening a Pandora's Box that was best left alone?!

programme.title: Over My Dead Body
programme.desc: A dead body and a hotchpotch of homeowners in a residential building on a single night: all hell breaks loose. As the Jewish axiom has it, “man thinks; God laughs.” On a night like any other, Ming, together with his wife and mother-in-law, finds an anonymous naked dead body lying at their doorstep. They might not know who the body was, but they have no doubt that their unit will become a “murder home” once this is exposed. Its property value will nosedive, and they will be transformed from blissful homeowners to miserable victims. So they decide to pass the buck to their neighbours. There are eleven living residents in four units on the same floor. Besides Ming's family of five, there are the retired elderly couple, Mr. & Mrs. Chan; the single lady Mary and her maid; and the Cheung's, an irascible father and his cantankerous son. Last but not least, there is this mysterious woman from an upper floor who chain smokes. This motley group of residents start fighting against one a
